name: Dassault Systèmes 3DEXPERIENCE API
what_it_does: Dassault Systèmes 3DEXPERIENCE REST APIs for integrated product lifecycle and collaboration platform. Enables AI agents to manage product structure and EBOM/MBOM data retrieval for engineering and manufacturing operations, handle engineering change and release process workflow monitoring, access ENOVIA collaboration and document management data, retrieve CATIA design and product structure data for engineering integration, manage simulation and analysis data from SIMULIA for virtual product validation, handle manufacturing process plan data from DELMIA, access supply chain and sourcing collaboration data, retrieve product compliance and sustainability data for environmental reporting, manage virtual product configuration and variant data, and integrate product data with ERP, MES, and enterprise platforms via 3DEXPERIENCE APIs.
use_cases: Retrieving EBOM data from manufacturing integration agents
Tracking engineering change status from product development agents
Accessing simulation results from engineering analysis agents
Monitoring compliance data from sustainability reporting agents
not_for: SMB PLM without enterprise Dassault ecosystem investment
Non-manufacturing industries without complex product structure and CAD
Simple project management without PLM, simulation, and manufacturing planning
best_when: An aerospace, automotive, or industrial manufacturer using 3DEXPERIENCE wants AI agents to automate product data retrieval, change management, simulation integration, manufacturing planning, and supply chain collaboration.
avoid_when: ENGINEERING RISK: 3DEXPERIENCE controls product release and change authorization for aerospace and automotive manufacturing — automated change approval without engineering and program manager review creates product safety and certification risk. ITAR-controlled design data in 3DEXPERIENCE requires US person access controls and export license compliance.

auth.notes: 3DEXPERIENCE uses OAuth 2.0 with 3DPassport identity platform. Developer portal at developer.3ds.com. Cloud-hosted (3DEXPERIENCE Works) and on-premise deployment. Webhooks for platform events. REST API with JSON. Vélizy-Villacoublay, France HQ. Public (DSY Euronext). CATIA, ENOVIA, SIMULIA, DELMIA brands under 3DEXPERIENCE umbrella.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per role and user; cloud vs. on-premise pricing differs significantly
pricing.notes: Vélizy-Villacoublay, France. Founded 1981. Public (DSY Euronext). $6.0B+ annual revenue. PLM and simulation software market leader. 300,000+ corporate customers in 140+ countries. CATIA is dominant in aerospace and automotive CAD. 3DEXPERIENCE platform unifies CATIA, ENOVIA, SIMULIA, DELMIA. Competes with Siemens (NX, Teamcenter) and PTC (Creo, Windchill) for PLM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: ENGINEERING RISK: 3DEXPERIENCE change release controls production-critical data; automated change approval without engineering review creates aerospace and automotive safety risks
ITAR compliance — aerospace 3DEXPERIENCE instances contain ITAR-controlled technical data; access requires US person controls, export license, and strict data governance
3DPassport identity — 3DEXPERIENCE uses 3DPassport for identity federation; ensure OAuth flow is configured against 3DPassport not general OAuth providers
Multi-brand platform — 3DEXPERIENCE unifies CATIA (CAD), ENOVIA (PLM), SIMULIA (simulation), DELMIA (manufacturing); each has separate API endpoints and data models
Cloud vs. on-premise API parity — 3DEXPERIENCE cloud (Works) and on-premise have different API availability; cloud has more REST coverage; verify on-premise REST API status
6WTagger data model — 3DEXPERIENCE uses 6W Tags for data classification; understand the 6W tagging model for proper data queries and navigation
agent_readiness.security_notes: PLM and simulation. SOC2, ITAR, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product design, BOM, and simulation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: PLM and simulation. SOC2, ITAR, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product and engineering data.
